idle.animationPrompt: Idle. Machine body stays 100% still. Only the colored LEDs animate: top bezel dots flicker, button grid pulses, sidecar amber bar pulses. Screen logo steady. No chassis motion.
idle.note: AutoSprite interpreted the prompt loosely: chassis silhouette stays still as requested, but the screen 'g' cycles through diagnostic colors (mint → cyan → orange/green → amber/yellow) — asset model treats the salient subject as the animation target. Per generate-spritesheet skill, asset animation has no first-frame-lock so this drift is structural. Kept for now; iterate later if the brand-color drift is a problem.
